history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays screenshots from a mobile game, likely Free Fire, showcasing in-game items and character outfits. The first panel shows a collection of fashion items, emotes, skill skins, postures, collections, vehicles, profiles, and other miscellaneous items. The second panel features a character in a dark outfit with glowing blue accents, standing on a platform, with a phone number overlaid on the image. The third panel shows another character in a similar outfit and also displays weapon skins, specifically for the M1887 shotgun, with various stats and customization options. There is no nudity, pornographic material, or suggestive content present in any of the panels.
